mapper.select: select from_status as fromStatus, to_status as toStatus, to_status as statusCode, trigger_source as triggerSource, trigger_source as source, trigger_no as triggerNo, operator_id as operatorId, operator_name as operatorName, happen_time as happenTime, remark from payment_order_status_flow where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and order_type = #{orderType} and order_id = #{orderId} and del_flag = 0 order by happen_time asc, id asc
